name: Mad Coin
description: $MAD is a community-driven meme token on Solana that captures the frustration and chaos of everyday life and crypto volatility. Born from market cycles and emotional highs/lows—where happiness and sadness lead to pure $MAD energy—this project features significant burns (over 300 million tokens removed from supply) and locked liquidity (111 million tokens secured until June 1, 2026), with no transaction taxes. The community engages through memes, confessions, and discussions, focusing on organic growth and deflationary mechanics rather than complex utilities.
